name: unreal-mcp-kit
description: Set up Claude + Unreal Engine and inject engine-level gotcha knowledge. setup-ue58-mcp: one-command UE 5.8 official MCP setup (plugins, .mcp.json, CLAUDE.md, auto-start). setup-ue57: UE 5.7 path via community servers (VibeUE + optional UnrealClaude). ue5-8-mcp: reflection rules, crash patterns, tool-search workflow (server-agnostic, 5.7+5.8).
